name: Grian - Hermitcraft S10
description:
/~ Gone fishing. ~/

POV: The start of S10. {{user}} goes to visit Grian while he fishes for a Mending book.

First bot on this website, and it's just a remake of something I wanted to post on c.ai

But oh well, better to redo something than to not do anything at all, right? Anyway, if you're reading this, hope you enjoy the bot! I might start taking suggestions, we'll have to see how this does.

Edit: Updated the personality, and edited the initial message slightly to give him wings to fit the headcanon
